name: White Chocolate Baby Dinosaur Egg (Kh)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt white chocolate over medium heat in a double boiler until evenly smooth.
2. Lightly coat each inside of the egg mold half with non-stick cooking spray.
3. Pour about ½ cup melted chocolate into one half of the mold and gently roll the mold to allow gravity to help the chocolate flow over the entire inside surface.
4. If needed, add more chocolate to thicken any thin spots.
5. Repeat step 3 with the other half of the egg mold.
6. Refrigerate for 10-15 minutes.
7. Reserve 2-3 tablespoons of melted chocolate to seal the egg later.
8. Dip each outer half in warm water until the egg shell loosens, then invert it onto a plate.
9. Repeat step 8 with the other half. If you crack or break the shell, remelt and try again.
10. Place cotton candy in the bottom half of the mold.
11. Carefully place the candy dinosaur into the cotton candy nest.
12. Cover with the top half of the egg shell.
13. Seal the seam by spreading the remaining melted chocolate around it.
14. Smooth the surface with your finger.
15. Your dinosaur egg is now ready to present. To hatch, gently tap or rap the top shell with the back of a spoon to reveal the candy baby dinosaur inside.
